prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland as it discusses pesticide regulation, which is devolved and thus relevant for decision-making by the Scottish Government. The UK Government expresses intent to work with devolved administrations, including Scotland, for a consistent approach to pesticide use and regulation.
